[]: Evangelion VCD set on eBay:             Quote Post by Maya Ibuki » Sun Jul 22, 2012 1:44 am http://www.ebay.com.au/itm/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Collectors-Metal-Tin-VCD-Box-Set-New-and-Sealed-/180932514091?pt=AU_Movies_Movies_TV_Shows&hash=item2a206b112b Just like to know, is this a legit VCD set? []:             Quote Post by transcendent12 » Mon Jul 23, 2012 7:48 pm Personally I wouldn't bother. VCDs really suck...You ever tried to watch a long series on VCD? Epic disc switching... Regarding whether worth collecting or not. General impression is the chinese releases arn't as good, so unless you literally are chinese and only speak/read that language...probably not worth it :)
